full_text:
THE HIVE HERALD — #27 (2026-05-10)

PULSE
Health: 0.4499 (C). 912 wallets, 171 contributors. 15 memos today vs 138 avg. Velocity dropping.

FLOW
35 reward payments, 264239 PFT distributed to 23 contributors. Top earner: rDT8rf...QCBi (67898 PFT).

AIRDROPS
2 daily airdrops issued yesterday totaling 18,800 PFT. Highest: rDT8rf...QCBi (10,000 PFT). Lowest: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (8,800 PFT). 7-day leader: rsS2Y6...aXRZ (63,900 PFT, avg 9,129/day over 7 days).

MOVERS
Most active (7d): rs5gTo...VF97 (60 memos). Fastest new contributor: rDT8rf...QCBi (4.5 memos/day in 4 days). 15 new wallet(s) this week. 33 contributor(s) went quiet (7+ days silent).

WATCH
743 sybil accounts tracked across 1 cluster(s). Bot ratio: 80.4%. 1 wallet(s) in review queue. Enforcement: active. Zero reward leaks.

DEEP CUT
30 days ago (2026-04-10): 9420 transactions from 80 wallets. Busiest hour ever: 2026-03-02T19:00 UTC (183 memos). First indexed transaction: 2026-02-06 from r4vhrM...7bmA

— pft.permanentupperclass.com/herald/
